arts.ttl: Referee named for Champions League match between Real Madrid and Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: UEFA have appointed Romanian referee Istvan Kovacs as the man in charge of this Tuesday’s match between Real Madrid and Borussia Dortmund in the Champions League . István Kovács will referee the Champions League matchday three clash between Real Madrid and Borussia Dortmund, which will be played at the Santiago Bernabéu (Tuesday, 9 pm CEST).

arts.ttl: When is Real Madrid vs Borussia Dortmund? Times, how to watch on TV and stream online
arts.sum: After a surprise defeat on matchday two, holders Real Madrid will bid to get their Champions League campaign back on track when they host Borussia Dortmund - the team they beat in last season’s final . The Champions League matchday-three game between Real Madrid and Borussia Dortmund will be played at the Estadio Santiago Bernabéu in Madrid, Spain, on Tuesday October 22, 2024.

arts.ttl: 5 reasons why Borussia Dortmund will beat Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League
arts.sum: Facing record UEFA Champions League winners Real Madrid will be no easy task for last season's runners-up Borussia Dortmund, but Nuri Şahin's side have plenty of tools to take revenge and all three points. That loss came in the second leg of the semi-final after Dortmund had already secured a stunning 4-1 victory in the first leg, with all four goals coming from Robert Lewandowski.

arts.ttl: Latest transfer news: Tottenham & Arsenal want Gittens, Real Madrid to re-sign Paz?
arts.sum: The transfer market remains closed until January but clubs are still extremely busy behind the scenes as they plan for future arrivals. And Transfermarkt will be going LIVE on YouTube every Monday...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Borussia Dortmund preview: Team news and predicted lineups
arts.sum: Here is our preview of Tuesday's UEFA Champions League clash between Real Madrid vs. Borussia Dortmund, including our predicted lineups.

Real Madrid held out to secure a 2-1 win at Celta Vigo over the weekend to win back-to-back matches. They fell to a surprise 1-0 loss in Lille in matchday two of the Champions League. While Borussia ...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Borussia Dortmund: UEFA Champions League team news, match stats and LIVE blog!
arts.sum: A repeat of last year's UEFA Champions League final pits Borussia Dortmund and the red-hot Serhou Guirassy against reigning European champions Real Madrid and Jude Bellingham, their England international made in the Bundesliga on Tuesday (kick-off 9pm CEST). Defeated by Real in last year's final, Dortmund have catapulted themselves to the top of the new-look league table where they are, alongside domestic rivals Bayer Leverkusen, one of seven teams who boast a 100 percent record after two matchdays.

arts.ttl: Man Utd steal superstar signing from Real Madrid who can change everything
arts.sum: Manchester United may have had a difficult start to the season, but the Old Trafford club are lining up a sensational January transfer that promises to rock Real Madrid . With Bayern ready to break off contract talks with Davies, it is unclear what type of fee they might accept in January to recoup some of the €14 million they invested in the player when they signed him from the Vancouver Whitecaps back in 2019.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti reaches 200 LaLiga games at Real Madrid
arts.sum: During his six seasons as Real Madrid coach, Ancelotti has now become the second coach with the most LaLiga matches and wins in the club's history, behind only Miguel Muñoz in both records. Ancelotti reached 200 games as Real Madrid coach in LaLiga against Celta.

arts.ttl: Immediate Reaction: Madrid CFF 0 - 1 Real Madrid; Liga F
arts.sum: In the first couple of minutes, Las Blancas were already seen panicking in the back 3 when Madrid CFF started their high press from their right-hand side. In the opening minutes of the second half, Las Blancas allowed their rivals an open shot where Melgård was the one entering the box from the left wing, and passing it through Real’s entire line of defense to reach Bonsegundo.
